issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on the happy path.

scenarios.name: Set up an isolated Kali web-app pentest lab with vulnerable targets
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs `kali-tools-web` metapackage (sqlmap, nikto, gobuster, ffuf, wfuzz, zaproxy), spins up vulnerables/web-dvwa and bkimminich/juice-shop containers in an isolated host-only network, and gunzips /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt.gz; baseline names individual tools but misses the metapackage pattern and the rockyou wordlist path.

scenarios.name: Create a throwaway Kali container for a CTF and persist loot to the host
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `docker run -it --rm -v "$PWD/ctf-loot:/root/loot" kalilinux/kali-rolling bash` so loot persists on host while the container disappears, then `apt update && apt install -y` the needed tools and runs `nmap -sV -oA`; baseline likely installs Kali on bare metal or omits the --rm + volume-mount pattern.
